Full Service PEO

Other products and add-ons
Some business challenges require a little something different. Don’t worry — we’ve got you covered.
Compliance

Streamline HCM and post-payroll compliance with the only all-in-one compliance solution.
Learn more

A cost-effective, all-inclusive paycard program that integrates into your payroll system. Pay workers with paycards and help them on the path to financial wellness.

docs.text:
ADP Developer Resources
Developer Resources
Share your feedback to help us improve our developer resources.
An asterisk (
*
) means the field is required.
Can we contact you in the future regarding your feedback?
*
Need help?
Please visit the
support page
to get access to support resources as either a partner or a client.
Sign in
Integrate with ADP’s API Platform
Let us personalize your developer experience by answering the question below
Let's go
Looking to integrate with your company’s data? Try ADP API Central
API Central makes it easy to access ADP APIs, tools and services, all in one place.
Learn more about API Central
What to expect when integrating with ADP
The integration process varies depending on whether you’re an ADP client looking to access your own company’s data or an ADP Marketplace partner selling your integration to clients on our digital storefront.
ADP clients
ADP Marketplace partners
Integrating as an ADP client*
*Process varies for international clients. Learn more about
integrating outside North America.
Learn what’s available to ADP clients
Unleash the power of ADP data
ADP provides access to robust APIs that span the employee life cycle — HR, time and labor management, payroll, and more. Simply choose which fields you want to use in your application. Here's an example of the data you can get from the comprehensive /hr/v2/workers API, used with the
ADP Workforce Now®
payroll platform.

ADP takes data privacy seriously. Representative data fields and example values shown are used for illustrative purposes only. This is neither an exhaustive list of data fields available from this API nor an actual client’s data.
Please refer to the API’s JSON request and response for a full list of data fields and sample data returned by the API as shown within
API Explorer for ADP Workforce Now
.
*Sample data fields taken from a JSON response from ADP Workforce Now. Note the number of supported data fields for a given API will vary by product.
Commonly asked questions
Access to ADP APIs is available to ADP clients, ADP Marketplace partners, and third-party integrators working on behalf of clients and partners. Clients can gain API access (and share that access with integrators) by purchasing
ADP API Central
, and then share access with third-party developers as needed.
ADP Marketplace partners
, who sell their third-party solutions on our HR storefront, must be accepted into our partner program and complete a sandbox agreement before accessing APIs.
Whether you’re an ADP client or an ADP Marketplace partner, you’ll need to log into your respective API platform (API Central for clients or the ADP Marketplace Partner Self-Service Tool for partners) and generate a mutual SSL certificate. Then, you’ll start a new project, which will grant you client credentials authorization. After that, you can start calling APIs.
Developers have access to a variety of ADP APIs that span the employee life cycle including HR, time and labor management, payroll, recruiting, benefits, and more. Available APIs vary by ADP product, such as ADP Workforce Now®, RUN Powered by ADP®, ADP Vantage HCM®, ADP Lyric, ADP DECIDIUM®, ADP iHCM®, and others.
Explore all APIs here
.
ADP does not offer integration development services directly; however, experienced ADP Marketplace partners are available to build and manage your custom integrations. Our team can recommend partners if you complete our Integration Needs Discovery Form
for companies using U.S.-based ADP systems
or
for companies using international ADP systems
.
If your company uses an ADP system based in the U.S., you can
learn more about ADP API Central here
. If your company uses an international ADP system,
learn more about ADP API Central here
.

analysis.name: ADP
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one payroll, HR, benefits, and compliance platform serving businesses from 1 employee to global enterprise.
analysis.ideal_customer: US-based businesses of any size needing outsourced payroll processing, HR administration, and compliance management

features.name: small business payroll
features.description: Payroll processing for businesses with 1–49 employees via RUN Powered by ADP
features.evidence_quote: Small Business Payroll (1-49 Employees) Fast, easy, accurate payroll and tax, so you can save time and money.

features.name: midsized to enterprise payroll
features.description: Payroll processing for 50–1,000+ employees via ADP Workforce Now

features.name: payroll tax management
features.description: Automated payroll tax calculation, filing, and remittance
features.evidence_quote: Fast, easy, accurate payroll and tax, so you can save time and money.

features.name: time & attendance tracking
features.description: Tools to track employee hours and manage labor costs and compliance
features.evidence_quote: Manage labor costs and compliance with easy time & attendance tools.

features.name: workforce management
features.description: Optimized scheduling, labor forecasting/budgeting, and attendance policy management
features.evidence_quote: workforce management adds optimized scheduling, labor forecasting/budgeting, attendance policy, leave case management

features.name: leave case management
features.description: Manage employee leave requests and cases within workforce management module
features.evidence_quote: workforce management adds optimized scheduling, labor forecasting/budgeting, attendance policy, leave case management

features.name: recruiting & hiring
features.description: End-to-end recruitment tools from job posting through candidate selection
features.evidence_quote: From recruitment to retirement, getting the very best out of your people.

features.name: talent management & activation
features.description: Performance management and employee development tools

features.name: employee experience
features.description: Tools to improve engagement and employee satisfaction

features.name: benefits administration
features.description: Employee benefits enrollment, management, and flexible administration
features.evidence_quote: Employee benefits, flexible administration, business insurance, and retirement plans.

features.name: retirement plans
features.description: 401(k) and other retirement plan management for employees

features.name: group health insurance
features.description: Group health insurance offerings for businesses and their employees

features.name: business insurance
features.description: Business insurance products offered through ADP

features.name: workers' compensation insurance
features.description: Workers' comp insurance products integrated with payroll

features.name: peo (professional employer organization)
features.description: Co-employment model where ADP handles HR, payroll, and benefits administration
features.evidence_quote: See how our team of experienced professionals can provide ongoing support for HR, payroll, and more

features.name: hr outsourcing
features.description: Fully outsourced HR function management by ADP teams

features.name: business tax credits
features.description: Identification and management of available business tax credits

features.name: payment solutions
features.description: Employee payment options including Wisely pay cards and digital wallets

features.name: health compliance
features.description: ACA and other health-related compliance management

features.name: wage garnishment
features.description: Automated processing and management of employee wage garnishments

features.name: compliance integrations
features.description: Integrations with government and compliance systems for seamless regulatory reporting

features.name: unemployment claims management
features.description: Processing and management of unemployment insurance claims

features.name: employment verification
features.description: Automated employment and income verification services

features.name: contractor management
features.description: 1099 contractor onboarding, payments, and compliance management

features.name: ai capabilities
features.description: AI-powered features embedded in payroll and HR workflows
features.evidence_quote: Bring breakthrough AI to your payroll and HR experiences.

features.name: app marketplace
features.description: Online store of third-party HR apps and integrations for customers, partners, and developers
features.evidence_quote: Our online store for HR apps and more; for customers, partners and developers.

features.name: custom integrations
features.description: Ability to build custom integrations with ADP data via APIs

features.name: global payroll
features.description: Multi-country payroll processing via ADP Global Payroll product

features.name: hcm platform (lyric hcm)
features.description: Full-suite human capital management platform designed for enterprise rhythms of work
features.evidence_quote: Empower your organization with a full-suite, HCM solution designed for your rhythms of work.

features.name: smartcompliance
features.description: Unified HCM compliance management across tax, employment verification, wage garnishment, and more
features.evidence_quote: Simplify and unify your HCM compliance processes.

features.name: wisely pay card
features.description: ADP-branded digital wallet and pay card for employee wage disbursement

features.name: datacloud analytics
features.description: People analytics and workforce benchmarking powered by ADP's aggregated data

features.name: api platform
features.description: Developer API access spanning HR, payroll, time/labor, recruiting, and benefits lifecycle
features.evidence_quote: ADP provides access to robust APIs that span the employee life cycle — HR, time and labor management, payroll

features.name: api central
features.description: Self-service portal for ADP clients to access APIs, tools, and services in one place
features.evidence_quote: API Central makes it easy to access ADP APIs, tools and services, all in one place.

features.name: hr data api (/hr/v2/workers)
features.description: REST API exposing full employee lifecycle data including PII, demographics, employment, and compensation
features.evidence_quote: comprehensive /hr/v2/workers API, used with the ADP Workforce Now® payroll platform

features.name: adp marketplace partner program
features.description: Partner ecosystem enabling third-party ISVs to sell integrations on ADP's HR storefront
features.evidence_quote: ADP Marketplace partners, who sell their third-party solutions on our HR storefront, must be accepted into our partner program

features.name: embedded payroll
features.description: Payroll-as-a-service offering for software providers to embed ADP payroll into their products

features.name: payroll calculators
features.description: Self-service online calculators for payroll and retirement planning
features.evidence_quote: Find payroll and retirement calculators, plus tax and compliance resources.

features.name: tax guides & forms
features.description: Library of tax guides and compliance forms for employers

features.name: adp totalsource (peo)
features.description: Full-service PEO product bundling HR, payroll, benefits, and compliance under co-employment

features.name: adp workforce now
features.description: Integrated HCM platform for mid-market businesses covering payroll, HR, time, and talent

features.name: run powered by adp
features.description: Small business payroll and HR platform for 1–49 employees

features.name: responsible ai governance
features.description: Published framework and policies for ethical AI use within ADP products

features.name: adp research / today at work
features.description: Proprietary workforce research and insights published to clients and prospects
features.evidence_quote: Discover the latest Today at Work insights from ADP Research

integrations: ERP systems (generic, named partners not listed in scraped sources)
Custom API integrations via ADP API Central
differentiators: Over 70 years of payroll and HR experience
Widest range of payroll and HR options than any other provider (self-claim)
Solutions span every business size: 1 employee to 1,000+
Full employee lifecycle API coverage (HR, time/labor, payroll, recruiting, benefits)
ADP DataCloud: workforce analytics backed by aggregated data across ADP's massive client base
Co-employment PEO model (ADP TotalSource) as alternative to traditional HR software
Embedded payroll offering for software providers
Global payroll capability across multiple countries

tiers.name: Small Business Payroll (RUN Powered by ADP)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Payroll & HR for 1–49 employees; promotional offer of up to 6 months free (limited time)

tiers.name: Midsized to Enterprise Payroll (ADP Workforce Now)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full HCM platform for 50–1,000+ employees; payroll, HR, time, talent

tiers.name: ADP Lyric HCM
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full-suite enterprise HCM solution; contact sales for pricing

tiers.name: ADP TotalSource (PEO)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Co-employment PEO with full HR, payroll, benefits outsourcing; contact sales

tiers.name: ADP Global Payroll
tiers.headline_inclusions: Multi-country payroll for global enterprises; contact sales

pricing.notes: No public pricing published; all plans require 'Get Pricing' inquiry. Small business payroll had a limited-time promotional offer of up to 6 months free for sign-ups by June 25. Pricing likely varies by employee count, modules selected, and contract term. API Central access is an add-on purchase for clients.
